title: CI Pipeline Reliability — Flaky Test Quarantine, Build Cache Fix, and Pipeline Optimization
description: Deliver the CI pipeline reliability MVP: automated flaky test detection and quarantine, Bazel remote cache audit and fix, CI failure classification UI, and module-level selective test execution. This is the highest-priority initiative based on discovery research (Opportunity Score 16/18) and Q4 developer satisfaction survey results confirming CI as the #1 pain point. Targets: median build time under 15 minutes, re-run rate below 10%, cache hit rate above 80%.
